title: Applications close in 48 hours — here's everything Australian founders need to know about Stripe x Startup Battlefield | TechCrunch
summary: One startup walks away with automatic entry into TechCrunch Disrupt in San Francisco — no application, no further competition, a guaranteed spot on the world’s most iconic startup stage. Many Startup Battlefield companies applied more than once before being selected.
